title: calamagrostis canescens f. geniculata
intro: Calamagrostis canescens f. geniculata, also known as the 'Wavy Brome Grass', is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Calamagrostis canescens f. geniculata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
